text: A shopping mall trip. Nex rests on a bench and meets Anna Tesla — the psychic girl from the stadium, waiting outside a tutor center. He heads to the vending machine to buy them juice.

The city goes dark. Security shutters slam down, sealing Nex in a back corridor. A wet, tearing sound comes from ahead. A vampire crouches over a body. It looks up. Nex throws garlic at it. The vampire laughs: "That is just a meme." It lunges.
